device_name.label: Device name
device_name.description: Display name for the AC; empty uses the device's own network name

show_temp.label: Show indoor temperature
show_temp.description: Show the indoor temperature next to the glyph while the AC is reachable

hide_when_absent.label: Hide when AC absent
hide_when_absent.description: Hide the widget when the AC is not reachable on the LAN

poll_interval.label: Poll interval (seconds)
poll_interval.description: How often to query the AC over the LAN
